data.name: My Pleasure - Season 1
data.detailed_description:
Due to his own mistakes, the young protagonist of the game is forced to spend some time outside of his house after a quarrel with his father. Yesterday, he led a lavish life filled with fun and parties with friends. However, he must now live under someone else's roof and figure out how not to die of boredom until he returns home. Can he come up with a plan to return to his exuberant life?



My Pleasure is a choice-driven adult visual novel, full of hot women, mystery, and sex! This VN is packed with high-quality graphics, a rich story, humor, and hot close-up animations!

Features:

  • High-quality graphics
  • Over 3.000 images
  • Over 50 animations
  • 7-10 hours of game
  • An engaging mystery
  • Plenty of lewd scenes with various girls
  • 2 Holiday Special Events
  • Dozens of Extra Scenes
  • Scene gallery
  • Multiple playthroughs



    My Pleasure contains graphic sexual content, including:

    • Oral Sex
    • Anal Sex
    • Vaginal Sex
    • Masturbation
    • Voyeurism
    • Teasing
    • Cumshots
    • Facial
    • Public Sex
    • Femdom
    • Netori
    • Exhibitionism
    • Creampies
    • Threesomes

    Player discretion is strongly advised.



    You can expect a 7- to 10-hour game that you can replay numerous times to experience different paths and girls.

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10
  • 處理器: Intel Core 2 Duo
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.0 or DirectX 9.0c compatible
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0c
  • 儲存空間: 5 GB 可用空間

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 處理器: Intel Core 2 Duo
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.0 or DirectX 9.0c compatible
  • 儲存空間: 5 GB 可用空間

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 16.04+
  • 處理器: Intel Core 2 Duo
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.0 or DirectX 9.0c compatible
  • 儲存空間: 5 GB 可用空間
